data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of service selection and time picking without leaving the app. However, the evidence provided does not confirm that this functionality is implemented as required. The linked use case describes the need for this feature, but there is no direct evidence showing that users can select services and pick times without exiting the app, leading to a clear gap in the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming that users can select services and pick times without leaving the app.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
